purpose: Public-safe snapshot of the ARK-M1 / SP-CUBE / GAIA-SAT integration scaffold after v0.11.

modules.next_gate: run low-power bench protocol and record CSV measurements
run passive plate delta-T comparison against baseline samples
attach verified citations, uncertainty fields and anti-double-counting IDs
convert claim style to executable lint rules
convert selected local drafts into remote issues only after explicit confirmation

snapshot_checks.description: Climate value claims remain separated into gross, MRV-dependent and OAK-adjusted categories.
Experimental protocols require baseline comparison before measured claims.
Methane events require unique event IDs before any value claim.
Public dashboard is informational, not operational or investment material.

targets: citations with verified URLs and access dates
snapshot check script or JSON schema
optional issue conversion after explicit confirmation
